activities.title: Retry WS Connection
activities.description: Budget-limited retry on connect failure. Prewarm counts as first attempt. stream_max_retries config limits total. On exhaustion: trigger HTTP fallback

activities.title: Retry WS Stream
activities.description: Budget-limited retry on stream error (server error, timeout, incomplete). Each retry opens new connection if needed. Emit StreamError 'Reconnecting N/N' for user feedback

activities.title: Handle 401 Unauthorized
activities.description: UnauthorizedRecovery state machine: check if recovery available and has_next(). Call recovery.next() to refresh auth. Retry request with new credentials. If recovery exhausted: propagate error

activities.title: Handle 426 Upgrade Required
activities.description: Server rejects WS upgrade (426 status). Return WebsocketStreamOutcome::FallbackToHttp. Caller activates session-scoped HTTP fallback via force_http_fallback()

activities.title: Evict Cache On Error
activities.description: On 4xx/5xx error: clear previous_response_id from connection-local cache. Prevents stale response reference on next request. Codex server also evicts server-side

activities.title: Handle Previous Response Not Found
activities.description: Server returns previous_response_not_found error. With store=false: no persistent fallback. Reset to full context request: set previous_response_id=null, send complete input array
